scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/mcp.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun && bun build ./src/omx/index.ts --outdir dist/omx --target node --format esm --external jsonc-parser && mv dist/omx/index.js dist/omx/index.mjs
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/mcp.ts --outdir dist --target bun && bun build ./src/cli/index.ts --outdir dist/cli --target bun && bun build ./src/omx/index.ts --outdir dist/omx --target node --format esm --external jsonc-parser && mv dist/omx/index.js dist/omx/index.mjs
